title: Announcements & Decisions
content:
# Announcements & Decisions

- Registrar News

- Thông báo

### Announcement: Undergraduate Graduation Review Timeline for Academic Year 2026

The Office of the Registrar is pleased to announce the official Graduation Review Timeline for Undergraduate Students graduating in 2026, together with key milestones and information regarding the Graduation Review Committees. This plan has been developed in close consultation with all Colleges and Academic Programs and has received full consensus. The approved timeline aims to […]
